isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Daniel Kim & 1of1 - Bonvoyage

Romanization

jeulgeoume chwihago
mumyeongui natseon dosiro tteonado
nareul dalmeun saramgwa
nae buranhan mirae
geu sai jjeum jameul jago
soneul bibyeo,geommul teumsaereul didyeo
meonjideophin eolgureul ssiseonaeryeohaedo
mureum kkeute
deonjyeojin maneun saram
0gwa 1 eodijjeume
seororeul bogo isseo

byeoreul jina
have a good ride, bon voyage
tto dareun sigane
mannage doelgeoya
dajianteorado
naranhi urin geotgoisseo
Woo-
Bon voyage

neon naui modeun nal
sesange matseon
neoui(ne) eokkaereul wirohago,
bicheun eodumeul dallae geodunikka
nan neoreul ttara
i teoneol kkeuteul geotgoisseo
soneul jwimyeon
neoui bichi
nae on momeul dwideopgo
majimak indeut neoui ireumeul bambokhago
byeoreul boneun
namgyeojin naneun mariya
chiyeolhage seororeul
gieokharyeo noraehagoisseo

byeoreul jina
have a good ride, bon voyage
tto dareun sigane
mannage doelgeoya
dajianteorado
naranhi urin geotgoisseo
Woo-
Bon voyage

byeoreul jina
have a good ride, bon voyage
tto dareun sigane
mannage doelgeoya
dajianteorado
naranhi urin geotgoisseo
Woo-
Bon voyage

Hangeul

즐거움에 취하고
무명의 낯선 도시로 떠나도
나를 닮은 사람과
내 불안한 미래
그 사이 쯤 잠을 자고
손을 비벼,건물 틈새를 디뎌
먼지덮힌 얼굴을 씻어내려해도
물음 끝에
던져진 많은 사람
0과 1 어디쯤에
서로를 보고 있어

별을 지나
have a good ride, bon voyage
또 다른 시간에
만나게 될거야
닿지않더라도
나란히 우린 걷고있어
Woo-
Bon voyage

넌 나의 모든 날
세상에 맞선
너의(네) 어깨를 위로하고,
빛은 어둠을 달래 거두니까
난 너를 따라
이 터널 끝을 걷고있어
손을 쥐면
너의 빛이
내 온 몸을 뒤덮고
마지막 인듯 너의 이름을 반복하고
별을 보는
남겨진 나는 말이야
치열하게 서로를
기억하려 노래하고있어

별을 지나
have a good ride, bon voyage
또 다른 시간에
만나게 될거야
닿지않더라도
나란히 우린 걷고있어
Woo-
Bon voyage

별을 지나
have a good ride, bon voyage
또 다른 시간에
만나게 될거야
닿지않더라도
나란히 우린 걷고있어
Woo-
Bon voyage

isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Walker & 1of1 - Stay with me

Romanization

I think you’re pretty neat
Matter fact
I love you
And it took some time to reach
A place of comfort
Now I don’t want you to leave
But I can’t go on this way
Feeling stronger every day
But always too shy to say
What I want, what I need
And I’d give the world to you
You can have it all for free
The only thing I ask of you
Stay with me
Days I spend with you
Remind me that it’s true
That I’m in love with you
And I hope things don’t change
But I know they can’t stay the same
I gotta tell you the truth
Cus I can’t go on this way
Feeling stronger every day
But always too shy to say
What I want, what I need
And I’d give the world to you
You can have it all for free
The one thing I ask of you
Stay with me
Cus I can’t go on this way
Feeling stronger every day
But always too shy to say
What I want, what I need
And I’d give the world to you
You can have it all for free
The one thing I ask of you
Stay with me

isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Meego & 1of1 - Purple stereo

Romanization

I was a blinded boy
flowers woke me up
Spring is burning
(oh) It’s nothing but
Ashes to our love
No love to dust

We’ve always been here
(We) running on the stereo
Always been here
We wonder why we found the love

Staying still here
We whisper under purple glow
Favorite distance
You lit a match to light me on
Spring is burning
(oh) It’s nothing but
Ashes to our love
No love to dust

We’ve always been here
(We) running on the stereo
Always been here
We wonder why we found the love

A lot of melodies
I love your fingers
Playing sounds of billie
(the) purple romance
(The glowing)
It’s a favorite scene
Just you and me
We dancing on the stereo
The one last…
The one last time

We’ve always been here
(We) running on the stereo
Always been here
We wonder why we found the love

isi.driveFileNames: Kim Tae Ri & Hong Kyung & 1of1 - Life goes on.mp3
isi.albums: Lost in Starlight (Soundtrack from the Netflix Film)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kim Tae Ri & Hong Kyung & 1of1 - Life goes on

Romanization

I wake up from my bed,
just to find it was a dream
Is it my darkest fear
no one will be there for me

I do know mun bakkeun ujuraneun geol
In the void jeongdabeul chatgoisseo

And life still goes on and on geureoge tto heulleogago
When all is said and done eonjengganeun algedoeljido
I have spent all my days
searching for the ways
But more I try, the more I am lost
in this universe

Everyday geujeo nan eodum araeseo
But gravity neege gage hae

And life still goes on and on geureoge tto heulleogago
When all is said and done eonjengganeun algedoeljido

Hangeul

I wake up from my bed,
just to find it was a dream
Is it my darkest fear
no one will be there for me

I do know 문 밖은 우주라는 걸
In the void 정답을 찾고있어

And life still goes on and on 그렇게 또 흘러가고
When all is said and done 언젠가는 알게될지도
I have spent all my days
searching for the ways
But more I try, the more I am lost
in this universe

Everyday 그저 난 어둠 아래서
But gravity 네에게 가게 해

And life still goes on and on 그렇게 또 흘러가고
When all is said and done 언젠가는 알게될지도
